title: 电商商品展示设计
description: A 3D render of a cute kawaii {argument name="subject" default="cloud"} character on a pure white background. The character has a soft, matte, squishy texture resembling clay or a stress toy. It features large glossy blac
prompt_raw: A 3D render of a cute kawaii {argument name="subject" default="cloud"} character on a pure white background. The character has a soft, matte, squishy texture resembling clay or a stress toy. It features large glossy black eyes with white highlights, a simple curved smile, and round pink blush on its cheeks. The edges and bottom of the figure have a subtle pastel gradient of {argument name="accent colors" default="pink, blue, and purple"}. Soft studio lighting, minimalist icon style, casting a gentle shadow.
prompt_preview: A 3D render of a cute kawaii {argument name="subject" default="cloud"} character on a pure white background. The character has a soft, matte, squishy texture resembling clay or a stress toy. It features large glossy blac
prompt_display_cn:
案例「subject」属于商品/电商。这是一张商品/电商视觉类案例，重点在产品主体、卖点、材质、包装、场景、文案和商业质感。适合改成商品主图、详情页、发布会图、包装展示或广告 KV。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A 3D render of a cute kawaii 【subject：cloud】 角色 on a pure white 背景. The 角色 has a soft, matte, squishy texture resembling clay or a stress toy. It features large glossy black eyes with white high光线s, a simple curved smile, and round pink blush on its cheeks. The edges and bottom of the figure have a subtle pastel gradient of 【accent colors：pink, blue, and purple】. Soft studio 光线ing, 极简ist 图标 风格, casting a gentle shadow.
prompt_template_cn:
制作一张【商品名称】的商品展示图。

商品主体：
画面中心展示【商品名称】，突出【核心卖点】和【产品特征】。产品材质为【材质】，颜色为【主色】。

使用场景：
背景为【场景环境】，体现【使用氛围/生活方式】。

商业信息：
加入标题【标题文案】、副标题【副标题文案】和卖点标签：【卖点1】、【卖点2】、【卖点3】。

视觉风格：
整体风格为【广告风格】，光影为【光影效果】，画面要干净、高级、有购买欲。

输出要求：
适合【电商平台/广告渠道】使用，画面比例为【画面比例】，文字清晰，产品不变形。
